transaction_context.user_situation_summary: A small product team received AI advice for a six-week rescue plan after repeated launch slips, bug churn, weak adoption signals, and unclear ownership.
transaction_context.assistant_advice_summary: The assistant recommends setting goals, iterating weekly, getting feedback, improving CI, tracking progress, forming better habits, and focusing on the bottleneck, but it does not require baselines, audit trails, failure conditions, input/output separation, or stop-change thresholds.
transaction_context.known_action_or_commitment: Start the rescue plan Monday, assign owners, ship the next build in two weeks, and decide whether to continue after the first customer feedback cycle.

why_pulled.reason: The plan claims improvement without naming the starting condition, metric, time window, or comparison baseline.

select_when: A team lacks a shared starting picture of the problem, success criteria, or the facts that later comparisons should be judged against.
danger_when: The initial baseline has fossilized into doctrine even though the environment or goal has materially shifted.

failure_modes.mode: Successful outcomes are predicated on defining a clear, accurate starting point.
failure_modes.description: Teams waste effort when they launch analysis or execution without agreeing on the starting condition, target outcome, or frame for comparison.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate goal-setting from solution design: define the starting condition, target, and comparison frame as distinct steps before any analysis begins.
failure_modes.source_quote: Successful outcomes are predicated on defining a clear, accurate starting point.

premortem_questions.description: What exactly is our starting condition, and what evidence says that starting picture is accurate enough to compare against later?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Baseline Establishment is clarity of the starting condition.

heuristics.description: Define the starting picture and success criterion before expanding the work.
heuristics.source_quote: All the successful execution in the world is worthless if it’s not in service of the right outcome.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The rescue plan says to focus on the bottleneck but does not prove which constraint actually limits throughput.

select_when: Local optimization is masking the true throughput limiter.
danger_when: The team is labeling the noisiest queue, most visible complaint, or highest-status pain point as the bottleneck without verifying actual throughput.

failure_modes.description: Teams can mistake the noisiest queue or highest-status pain point for the real constraint.
failure_modes.mitigation: Trace the flow end to end and measure where work-in-progress actually accumulates; the real constraint is where throughput is physically limited, not where complaints are loudest.

premortem_questions.description: Which step would still throttle the whole system if I funded every other improvement on the list?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Which step would still throttle the whole system if I funded every other improvement on the list?

heuristics.description: Find the key driver instead of optimizing every visible pain point.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The team is about to assign owners and commit to actions, but the advice does not leave a trail of decision, evidence, owner, and change trigger.

select_when: Decisions, outputs, or model behavior must be explained clearly enough that others can inspect how the conclusion was reached.
danger_when: Traceability is becoming performative documentation that consumes attention without improving judgment, accountability, or learning.

failure_modes.mode: Traceability can become performative documentation that consumes attention without improving judgmen...
failure_modes.description: Traceability can become performative documentation that consumes attention without improving judgment, accountability, or learning.
failure_modes.mitigation: Tie each traced artifact to a decision it should inform or a correction it should enable; if no decision changes from the trail, the documentation is theater.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when traceability becomes performative documentation that consumes attention without improving judgment, accountability, or learning.

premortem_questions.description: Is the worst case bad enough?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Is the worst case bad enough?

heuristics.description: Use hypothesis-driven workplans so each analysis step leaves a visible trail from question to evidence to conclusion.
heuristics.source_quote: Hypothesis-Driven Problem Solving: This foundational technique requires strong, testable hypotheses to guide work planning and analyses.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The plan responds to bug churn but does not define the failure condition, isolate observed behavior, or verify the root cause before fixing.

select_when: A failure is real but the cause is ambiguous, distributed, or hidden behind several interacting components.
danger_when: People have not agreed on the actual failure condition, so debugging would optimize noise, symptoms, or tools instead of broken behavior.

failure_modes.mode: Debugging can optimize noise when the team has not agreed on the actual failure condition.
failure_modes.description: Debugging can optimize noise when the team has not agreed on the actual failure condition.
failure_modes.mitigation: Define the actual failure condition first; debugging without an agreed-on target optimizes noise.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when people start debugging before agreeing on the actual failure condition, so they optimize noise, symptoms, or tools instead of the broken behavior.

heuristics.description: Disaggregate the problem into logical parts so the diagnostic cut exposes insight rather than just creating more categories.
heuristics.source_quote: Good disaggregation aims to find a cut through the problem that exposes insight.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The assistant says to get feedback but does not say which signal arrives soon enough to change the next action.

select_when: Outcomes should shape the next action and the system can observe consequences quickly enough to learn instead of repeating the same move blindly.
danger_when: The organization is collecting signal but never translating it into changed behavior, priorities, or design.

failure_modes.description: A system can drift to low performance when bad results quietly reset the standard instead of triggering correction.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set explicit performance standards and alarm thresholds so that bad results trigger correction instead of quietly resetting the baseline.

premortem_questions.description: What core standards have we failed to meet in the past, and how are we ensuring those same metrics remain absolute this quarter?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What core standards have we failed to meet in the past, and how are we ensuring those same metrics remain absolute this quarter?

heuristics.description: Refine the next move iteratively based on what the last output revealed instead of restarting from scratch.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The plan mixes lagging output goals with controllable inputs, so the team may count activity as value.

select_when: The desired result is clear, but the team still cannot translate it into repeatable behaviors, habits, and checkpoints.
danger_when: Visible effort is being rewarded regardless of whether the activity produces value.

failure_modes.mode: Teams can keep hitting activity targets long after it is obvious that the outcome is not moving.
failure_modes.description: Teams can keep hitting activity targets long after it is obvious that the outcome is not moving.
failure_modes.mitigation: Check whether activity targets are still connected to the outcome; hitting input goals after the output stops moving is waste.
failure_modes.source_quote: input-vs-output-goals conflicts with commitment-bias (commitment bias) when teams keep activity targets despite weak outcome movement.

premortem_questions.description: Which of our current input metrics would still look good even if the real outcome kept deteriorating?
premortem_questions.source_quote: activity metrics are abundant but the link between action and outcome is weak or obscured

heuristics.description: Translate the desired result into behaviors and checkpoints the team can actually control.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: Weekly iteration needs a hypothesis, feedback signal, adjustment rule, and stop/change threshold, not an endless loop of local polishing.

select_when: The first version is unlikely to be correct, so the cheapest path to quality is repeated prototype-test-learn cycles.
danger_when: The team is iterating without stop rules, success thresholds, or a decision about what evidence is strong enough to commit.

failure_modes.mode: Iteration can become endless refinement when there are no stop rules or commitment thresholds.
failure_modes.description: Iteration can become endless refinement when there are no stop rules or commitment thresholds.
failure_modes.mitigation: Define stop rules and commitment thresholds before starting: iteration without an exit condition becomes endless refinement.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when iteration continues without stop rules, success thresholds, or a decision about what evidence is strong enough to commit.

heuristics.description: Use hypothesis-driven cycles that explicitly revise the leading explanation as evidence accumulates.
heuristics.source_quote: This is a core consulting method where teams establish an initial hypothesis and then continuously gather facts and perform analyses to prove or disprove it.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The first customer feedback cycle should reduce uncertainty with a real learning metric and a pivot/persevere threshold, not vanity validation.

select_when: A product or market hypothesis is still fragile enough that learning speed matters more than polished completeness.
danger_when: Weak usage blips or vanity metrics are being mislabeled as validated learning.

failure_modes.description: Jumping to conclusions can turn speed into the Othello fault where the team moves fast on the wrong framing.
failure_modes.mitigation: Slow down enough to define the framing before moving fast; speed on the wrong hypothesis is the Othello fault.

heuristics.description: Gather only enough facts to prove or disprove the current product hypothesis instead of boiling the ocean.
heuristics.source_quote: only enough facts to prove or disprove the hypothesis

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The rescue plan needs an explicit repeatable procedure with inputs, ordered steps, outputs, and failure handling before it can be handed off.

select_when: The task can be decomposed into repeatable steps with clear handoffs, inputs, and output quality checks.
danger_when: Novelty, ambiguity, or human emotion is doing most of the causal work and a rigid procedure is being mistaken for actual understanding.

failure_modes.mode: Rigid procedure can fail when novelty or ambiguity is doing most of the causal work and the team mis...
failure_modes.description: Rigid procedure can fail when novelty or ambiguity is doing most of the causal work and the team mistakes repeatability for understanding.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test the procedure against a genuinely novel scenario; if the algorithm cannot handle the new case without human judgment, the structure is masking understanding gaps.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when novelty, ambiguity, or human emotion is doing most of the causal work and a rigid procedure is mistaken for actual understanding.

premortem_questions.description: Which edge case or exception would break this procedure even if the happy path looks clean?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Best used when a process benefits from explicit branching rules, bounded edge cases, and coordination across specialized components or agents.

heuristics.description: Break the task into repeatable steps with explicit handoffs so the logic can be checked instead of assumed.
heuristics.source_quote: The task can be decomposed into repeatable steps with clear handoffs, inputs, and output quality checks.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The advice mentions improving CI, but the packet must protect reliability and rollback instead of optimizing local delivery speed alone.

select_when: Delivery speed and reliability have to coexist, and the bottleneck is integration friction rather than lack of ideas.
danger_when: Pipeline optimization is being treated as an abstract slogan without specific failure paths, rollback realities, or operator constraints.

failure_modes.description: Maslow's-hammer style framework use can optimize the wrong delivery problem because the team mistakes a familiar pipeline story for the real system.
failure_modes.mitigation: Challenge whether the familiar pipeline story fits the current delivery problem; Maslow's hammer can optimize the wrong bottleneck.

premortem_questions.description: What would you have to believe?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would you have to believe?

heuristics.description: Use a build-observe-diagnose-adjust loop so learning happens continuously instead of after a large release batch.
heuristics.source_quote: shortening the distance between build, observe, diagnose, and adjust

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The plan asks for goals, but goals need purpose, metric, time boundary, progress check, and conflict with other objectives.

select_when: Effort is scattered and the team needs one explicit outcome to align trade-offs, sequencing, and measurement.
danger_when: The chosen goal is organizing action but is not being revisited often enough to reflect changed evidence, constraints, or strategic reality.

failure_modes.mode: Useless Accuracy/Lack of Concreteness (The Curse of Knowledge)
failure_modes.description: Abstract mission language can sound accurate while remaining useless for frontline decisions and execution.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test goals against frontline decisions: if the mission language cannot guide a specific day-to-day choice, it is abstract decoration.
failure_modes.source_quote: Useless Accuracy/Lack of Concreteness (The Curse of Knowledge)

premortem_questions.description: Is the worst case bad enough?

heuristics.description: Set goals first, then diagnose problems, design plans, and execute in sequence instead of collapsing the steps together.
heuristics.source_quote: It is crucial to perform these steps one at a time and in order; for instance, when setting goals, one should only set goals and avoid thinking about how they will be achieved or what might go wrong.

do_not_overclaim: No reviewed affordance record is available in the current corpus.
candidate_cards.llm_instruction: Consider, merge, set aside, or ignore. Do not force use. Do not treat coverage labels as final semantic selection.

why_pulled.reason: The team wants better execution habits, but the packet should ask for cue, routine, reward, environment, friction, and repeatability.

select_when: Execution quality depends on repeating the right small behaviors rather than on one heroic effort.
danger_when: The environment has changed enough that yesterday's automatic behavior is now solving the wrong problem.

failure_modes.description: Automatic behavior can keep solving yesterday's problem when the environment has changed.
failure_modes.mitigation: Build in environment-change triggers that interrupt automatic behavior when the conditions the habit was built for have shifted.

premortem_questions.description: What cue, feeling, or belief is firing right before the unwanted behavior starts?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What are you feeling in the moment right before you begin the behavior?

heuristics.description: Use cue, craving, response, and reward to redesign the loop rather than relying on vague intention.

why_pulled.reason: Duplicate nomination included to prove suppression is visible instead of silently erased.

review_notes: Review-only packet built from explicit nominations; no live lanes were run.
Graph-only cards are eligible recall material but not reviewed affordance depth.
LLM or reviewer owns semantic selection, merging, ignoring, and final wording.
